_comment: Stop hook — nudges Claude to keep going if it stopped mid-task. Paste this into ~/.claude/settings.json under the top-level hooks key. If you already have other Stop hooks, add this as an additional entry in the array.

hooks.prompt: Did you complete the task fully or stop mid-way? If mid-way, continue without waiting for a new message. If complete, confirm with a short summary of what was done and how it was verified.
